title: Module 1
content:
Fundamentals of Marketing Communications: Introduction to Marketing
Communication, Basic Model of Communication Process, Consumer
Information Processing Model, Hierarchy of Communication Effects,
Marketing
Communications
Mix,
Dyadic
Communication,
Mass
Communication,
Word-of-Mouth
Communication,
and
Group
Communications, Role of Public Relations in Marketing Communications,
Integrated Marketing Communications (IMC)

title: Module 2
content:
Consumer Behaviour and Communication Strategies: Consumer Behaviour
and Marketing Communications, Consumer-Driven Communication Strategy,
Diffusion Process Types of Communication Sources, Factors Influencing
Adoption, Purchase Decision Process, Hierarchy of Needs, Wants, and Buying
Motives, Perception, Attitudes, Learning, Cognitive Dissonance, Cultural
Elements in Communication, Social Influences on Promotion

title: Module 3
content:
Promotion Planning, Advertising, and Media:
Promotion Planning and Techniques, Advertising Techniques, Advertising
Media, International Promotion and Advertising

title: Module 4
content:
Advanced Promotional Tools and Public Relations:   Advertising Research,
Outdoor, Transit, and Corporate Advertising, Sales Promotion and Publicity,
Personified Promotion (Personal Selling), Direct Marketing, Public Relations
